creator: sirdice@gmail.com
text:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/

Produces an error: 

Error: No valid CVS roots found! See @CVSrepositories in the configuration file (/usr/local/www/www.freebsd.org/data/cgi/cvsweb.conf).

cvsweb is easier to use than svnweb (easier to compare different releases/versions). Freshports also refers to cvsweb.
